description: You are a Clinical Research Coordinator for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Log in to OpenClinica (root / Admin123!) and record two separate occurrences of the 'Concomitant Medication' repeating event for subject DM-104. The first occurrence must have a Start Date of 2024-02-15 and 'Lisinopril' recorded in the Location field. The second occurrence must have a Start Date of 2024-02-20 and 'Amoxicillin' recorded in the Location field.
